Yeh Problem Hai?
Kya Aapka Business Google Pe Nahi Milta?
Roz hazaron customers Noida mein aapki service dhundhte hain. Website nahi hai toh competitor milta hai — aapko nahi.
😔
Website Nahi = Trust Nahi
82% customers online check karte hain pehle. Website nahi toh competitor ke paas jaate hain.
📍
Google Maps Pe Nahi Hain
"Restaurant near me" search karte hain roz. Kya aap show ho rahe ho?
😤
Developer Bahut Mehanga
Bade agencies Rs.50,000+ lete hain — aur baad mein gayab ho jaate hain.
📉
Competitor Aage Nikal Raha Hai
Aapka competitor website se naye customers le raha hai jo aapke hone chahiye the.
OnlineLao Yeh Sab Solve Karta Hai!
Hum Noida ke local businesses ke liye affordable, professional websites banate hain — aur baad mein bhi saath rehte hain.
✓

✓

Fark Dekho
Website Se Pehle vs Baad
Yeh hota hai jab local business online aata hai.
😟 Website Se Pehle
Google pe bilkul nahi milte
Sirf walk-in customers — limited reach
Competitor aage nikal raha hai
No online reviews ya visibility
Business sirf local log jaante hain
😄 Website Ke Baad
Google pe pehle page pe show hota hai
24/7 customers find kar sakte hain
Professionally competitor se ahead
Google reviews — trust auto build hota hai
Poore Noida NCR mein visibility
3x

Sawaal Jawab
Aapke Sawaal, Hamare Jawab
Common questions — sab yahan answer hain.
Website banana mein kitna time lagta hai? +
Hum 3-5 working days mein deliver karte hain. Rush delivery bhi possible — 24-48 ghante mein small charge ke saath.
Kya domain aur hosting bhi aap handle karoge? +
Haan! Sab hum karte hain. Domain cost approx Rs.499/year — clearly batayenge. Koi hidden charge nahi.
Payment kaise karein? +
Payment UPI se — GPay, PhonePe, Paytm. 50% advance pehle, baaki website live hone par.
Website mobile pe sahi dikhegi kya? +
100% haan! Mobile-first websites banate hain hum. Phone, tablet, computer — teenon pe perfect. Guarantee.
Baad mein changes chahiye toh? +
Standard mein 2 changes/month. Premium mein unlimited. Bas WhatsApp karo — 24 ghante mein done.
Google pe rank karwa sakte ho? +
Basic on-page SEO sab packages mein. Advanced SEO Rs.999/month. Google Business Profile setup FREE.
Noida ke alawa bhi karte ho? +
Bilkul! Poora Delhi NCR — Noida, Greater Noida, Gurgaon, Faridabad, Ghaziabad, Delhi. Sab remotely.
